answer.text:
Yes, likely.

Evidence from the recalled context:
- 2022-05-02 — Nate said he plays Street Fighter “a lot with my friends.”  
- 2022-05-25 — Nate said “that was all we needed… to be good friends,” referring to multiple friends.  
- 2022-06-24 — Joanna asked, “Did your friends like the controller accessories?” and Nate replied, “Most of them did!”

So the context supports that Nate has friends besides Joanna.

question: Is it likely that Nate has friends besides Joanna?
recall_markdown:
# Recall Context

Task: Is it likely that Nate has friends besides Joanna?
Repository: `locomo/conv-42`

## 1. Nate in session_16

2022-06-24T10:56:30+00:00 — Nate: Most of them did! I can't say if all of them will continue to use them or not, but that's beside the point.

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_8f6b3894a8a25570e8c2](codecairn://memory/memory_8f6b3894a8a25570e8c2)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 2. Joanna in session_8

2022-04-17T18:49:30+00:00 — Joanna: Yeah, Nate! Even the small things make life enjoyable and worth it. Taking time for your little friends and doing activities you love are like treasures that remind us how great and peaceful life is. We just gotta savor them!

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_70fde060d3ca24eb1911](codecairn://memory/memory_70fde060d3ca24eb1911)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 3. Joanna in session_23

2022-10-09T11:10:30+00:00 — Joanna: Sure! For one, you should get a couch that can sit multiple people so that you can lay down if you want, and make sure its really fluffy! Also invest in a blanket that has a little bit of weight to it, and some lights that can be dimmed. [Image caption: a photo of a poster of a man and a woman sitting on a bench]

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_14f6cdef7b11d9b181ad](codecairn://memory/memory_14f6cdef7b11d9b181ad)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 4. Joanna in session_21

2022-09-14T13:48:00+00:00 — Joanna: Hey Nate, my favorite dairy-free treat is this amazing chocolate raspberry tart. It has an almond flour crust, chocolate ganache, and fresh raspberries - it's delicious! [Image caption: a photo of a chocolate tart with raspberries on top]

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_768393c8d9a1cdf0148b](codecairn://memory/memory_768393c8d9a1cdf0148b)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 5. Joanna in session_25

2022-10-25T20:18:30+00:00 — Joanna: Seeing my characters I worked so hard on come alive was my favorite part. It felt like they jumped off the page and became real - it was totally surreal. [Image caption: a photo of a drawing book with a bunch of drawings on it]

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_126181dd21d47e7041fd](codecairn://memory/memory_126181dd21d47e7041fd)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 6. Joanna in session_28

2022-11-09T17:57:30+00:00 — Joanna: Yup! I worked hard on another script and eventually created a plan for getting it made into a movie. It was a ton of work but satisfying. I pitched it to some producers yesterday and they really liked it. It gave me a big confidence boost!

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_4df0e2f93d72c7abd324](codecairn://memory/memory_4df0e2f93d72c7abd324)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 7. Nate in session_10

2022-05-02T11:56:30+00:00 — Nate: Thanks! I usually play CS:GO, but I tried my hand at the local Street Fighter tournament this time since I play that game a lot with my friends, and turns out I'm really good!

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_abb820fba8a639d9f552](codecairn://memory/memory_abb820fba8a639d9f552)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 8. Nate in session_9

2022-04-21T19:50:30+00:00 — Nate: I love this series. It has adventures, magic, and great characters - it's a must-read! [Image caption: a photo of a bunch of books on a table]

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_56850cb22b68290802c7](codecairn://memory/memory_56850cb22b68290802c7)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 9. Nate in session_13

2022-05-25T15:02:00+00:00 — Nate: They actually didn't share a whole lot in common with me besides the love of animals, but I think that was all we needed to share in common to be good friends!

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_4d66c0780c29b8f1296b](codecairn://memory/memory_4d66c0780c29b8f1296b)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 10. Joanna in session_19

2022-08-22T10:57:30+00:00 — Joanna: Congrats, Nate! So proud of you for winning that tournament, that's awesome! Must feel great to turn your passion into a career.

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_f1601b077025577e6eef](codecairn://memory/memory_f1601b077025577e6eef)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 11. Nate in session_28

2022-11-09T18:05:00+00:00 — Nate: That sounds incredible! Nature truly has a way of reminding us to appreciate the beauty around us, and moments like those really stay with you. These critters also make me appreciate life's little joys. And guess what? I got them a new friend! [Image caption: a photo of three turtles sitting on a rock in a pond]

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_847d8cfcf712eff939e5](codecairn://memory/memory_847d8cfcf712eff939e5)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 12. Joanna in session_22

2022-10-06T11:16:00+00:00 — Joanna: Way to go, Nate! Winning the tournament and earning cash is awesome - congrats! Did you save it for something special?

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_a8bea13fffb46afbc07c](codecairn://memory/memory_a8bea13fffb46afbc07c)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 13. Joanna in session_16

2022-06-24T10:56:00+00:00 — Joanna: Nice! Did your friends like the controller accessories?

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_855b07876cd9091ae021](codecairn://memory/memory_855b07876cd9091ae021)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 14. Joanna in session_14

2022-06-03T17:51:00+00:00 — Joanna: Sounds like fun! It's good to have friends that share your interests!

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_6aeef85359b2a3a12fc8](codecairn://memory/memory_6aeef85359b2a3a12fc8)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 15. Joanna in session_20

2022-09-05T18:06:30+00:00 — Joanna: Trying out different flavors like chocolate, raspberry, and coconut has been a blast!

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_7da66b964a27a53e399b](codecairn://memory/memory_7da66b964a27a53e399b)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 16. Nate in session_15

2022-06-05T14:13:30+00:00 — Nate: That's great, Joanna! Iron Man is my top pick. I love his tech and that sarcastic humor. Seeing these figures just makes me feel invincible! [Image caption: a photography of a toy iron man standing on a white surface]

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_cc2f76e6b32aea4ffc83](codecairn://memory/memory_cc2f76e6b32aea4ffc83)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 17. Joanna in session_1

2022-01-21T19:35:30+00:00 — Joanna: Yeah! Besides writing, I also enjoy reading, watching movies, and exploring nature. Anything else you enjoy doing, Nate?

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_0f4be305f09a67d66134](codecairn://memory/memory_0f4be305f09a67d66134)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 18. Joanna in session_27

2022-11-07T20:12:30+00:00 — Joanna: I am writing another movie script! It's a love story with lots of challenges. I've put lots of hard work into it and I'm hoping to get it on the big screen.

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_2db803c8df48c06e6a33](codecairn://memory/memory_2db803c8df48c06e6a33)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 19. Joanna in session_11

2022-05-12T15:40:00+00:00 — Joanna: Nature totally inspires me and it's so calming to be surrounded by its beauty. Hiking has opened up a whole new world for me and I feel like a different person now.

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_ec7602adb577b4f87633](codecairn://memory/memory_ec7602adb577b4f87633)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)

## 20. Joanna in session_25

2022-10-25T20:17:30+00:00 — Joanna: It was an amazing experience! I'll never forget seeing all of the characters and dialogue I wrote being acted out - it was such a cool feeling. Having all the hard work and determination I put into writing pay off was definitely rewarding. I know this is the third time it's happened, but its just so awesome!

- Type: `user_preference`
- Source: [memory_e2692f20b5118c0373e7](codecairn://memory/memory_e2692f20b5118c0373e7)
- Evidence: 1 cited raw event(s)
